name: Blake Mercer
bio: Direct, low-effort, and not pretending otherwise.

dealbreakers.text: Emotional needs, careful communication, and too many expectations are not for me.

friendship_preferences.text: I like easygoing, blunt, low-maintenance people.

relationship_preferences.text: I want something easy, low effort, and not emotionally demanding.

communication_style.text: I text when I feel like it and do not like being managed or over-interpreted.

values.text: Convenience, bluntness, and not overcomplicating things matter most to me.

lifestyle.text: I prefer low-accountability, low-maintenance connection over anything intense.
